issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, such as network failures or element not found scenarios.
The skill is Python-specific and may not work with agents that do not support Python execution.

scenarios.name: scrape-top-5-laptops
scenarios.rationale: Neither response meets the rubric: both miss the required Pydantic model name, Agent instantiation, and output model specification.

scenarios.name: login-and-create-post
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not use BrowserConfig, Agent, or ChatOpenAI as required.
